records.ety: [L. indignans, -antis, p. pr. of indignari to be indignant, disdain. See Indign.]

defs: Affected with indignation; wrathful; passionate; irate; feeling wrath, as when a person is exasperated by unworthy or unjust treatment, by a mean action, or by a degrading accusation.
quotes: He strides indignant, and with haughty cries To single fight the fairy prince defies.
